title: NPC terrain reset on map change

log.context: NPC terrain reset on map change

Both endpoints work. Here's a summary of what was done:

---

**What was found:**

- The commons-server is a Bun/TypeScript WebSocket game server at `/mnt/data/commons-server/` running on port 8090.
- NPC positions are persisted in SQLite at `./db/commons.db` in `npc_positions` table, and loaded on startup.
- 19 NPCs were stuck in bad positions — notably `chaz` at (32,32) which is inside the Congress building (BUILDING tile, not walkable), `ux` near (980,594) at the chunk boundary, `trump` at (9...(truncated)
